name: Equity Lens Global Split Contract (V1)
purpose: Defines the platform-wide split dimensions that MUST exist (or be derivable) across all datasets, events, rollups, engines, and dashboards to prevent mixed-regime aggregation errors.
non_negotiables: These splits are REQUIRED on all rollups/aggregations; if missing, output must be UNKNOWN/INSUFFICIENT with explicit reasons.
Do not mix tracks by default. Track mixing is allowed only in explicit 'Multi-Asset Overview' surfaces using normalized/compatible metrics.
UNKNOWN is a first-class state; do not fill gaps with heuristics that reduce auditability.
All artifacts must be versioned with as_of_date + dataset_version + dataset_hash (or sha256_json).

v1_rules: MarketRadar runs in parallel tracks: RES_1_4, MF_5_PLUS, LAND (MF/LAND may be UNKNOWN until built).
MIXED_USE follows MF_5_PLUS logic in V1 (income-focused).
PURE_COMMERCIAL is tagged but not shown/scored in MarketRadar V1.
derived_from: Permits declared units/use (override only with explicit evidence/confidence)

canonical_dimensions.notes: Applies to sale-like events (deeds and MLS sold).
Preserve source layers; blending is allowed only with explicit composition rules.
Every rollup must declare its geographic scope explicitly.

requirements: UNKNOWN allowed and must be used when gates fail

canonical_dimensions.notes: Guidance language and UI surfaces must respect audience gating.

implementation_notes: Engines must emit explicit reasons when outputs are UNKNOWN/INSUFFICIENT due to missing splits or thin data.
Any future engine must either (a) carry these fields on outputs, or (b) be able to derive them deterministically from referenced artifacts.
